name: Classic Chronograph
description: A polished chronograph with dauphine hands, a stepped bezel, and an alligator strap tailored for evening wear.
altText: Classic chronograph watch with black dial, polished steel case, and dark leather strap

name: Ocean Regatta
description: A high-visibility diver with ceramic bezel, screw-down crown, and robust lume designed for coastal adventures.
altText: Professional dive watch with blue dial, rotating bezel, and integrated rubber strap

name: Heritage Moonphase
description: A hand-wound moonphase with guilloché dial work, heat-blued hands, and a display back for collectors.
altText: Rose gold moonphase watch with silver guilloche dial and brown leather strap

name: Metro Minimal
description: A slim city watch with an uncluttered dial, brushed case, and quick-release strap system for daily versatility.
altText: Minimalist silver watch with clean white dial and mesh bracelet

name: Grand Tourbillon Reserve
description: A limited-production tourbillon featuring a power reserve indicator, hand-finished bridges, and dramatic dial architecture.
altText: Luxury tourbillon watch with skeletonized dial and black alligator strap

name: Pilots GMT Meridian
description: A legible GMT with oversized crown, dual-time tracking, and brushed finishing suited to frequent travelers.
altText: Pilot style GMT watch with dark dial, large numerals, and canvas strap
